title: Bindings, Scope, Closures, and Lifetime · Behavior Brief: Hoisting Tdz
summary: Build configurable counters and validators without leaking mutable state across community-service widgets. Planned artifact: Add and verify the js hoisting tdz increment in a closure-backed state and validation library. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Predict declaration instantiation, function hoisting, and temporal dead-zone failures.
Resolve names through lexical environments and identify shadowing without guessing from call order.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
